title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 40.390 - Riot or breach of the peace, causing or participating — court-martial
text:
40.390.  Riot or breach of the peace, causing or participating — court-martial. — Any person subject to sections 40.005 to 40.490 who causes or participates in any riot or breach of the peace shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1035 § 114)
